𝕏

Patriots Day Justice Rally – Monday, April 20

📅 Save the Date
Monday, April 20 • 11 AM – 1 PM
1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA

Join us for a special Patriots Day Justice Rally at the ICE detention center at 1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA.

Bring your flag! Bring your revolutionary spirit!

If you have not registered for the event, you can register on mobilize.us here.

Volunteers Needed

  • Carpool drivers
  • Marshals, setup, and other

Parking

Sign up for the carpool here. There is no public parking nearby and they actively tow on District Ave and the side lots. For more parking options, click here.

For any questions, email info@fixice.org

Public Transportation

  • The MBTA bus route 350 starts at Alewife Station and has stops a 5 minute walk from 1000 District Ave.
  • The LRTA bus route 14 starts at the Kennedy Center in Lowell and uses the same stops close to 1000 District Ave. Some people have reported parking at Wegman's and taking the LRTA route 14 bus to the protest.

    • Spread the Word

    Help us get the word out! Share this event on social media and download the flyer below to post or forward.

    Suggested post:
    🦅 Patriots Day Justice Rally – Monday, April 20, 11 AM – 1 PM at the ICE detention center, 1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA. Bring your flag and revolutionary spirit! Register: https://fixice.org/patriotsrally. #PatriotsDayRally #FixICE #Mass50501 #ImmigrantRights #NoKings
    Share on Facebook Share on X Post on TikTok Post on Instagram

    For TikTok and Instagram: copy the text above, download the flyer, and paste when creating your post.
